name: Frequent Repurchaser
definition: Buys the same item 3+ times, with 0–2 other items.

name: Book Enthusiast
definition: Frequently purchases multiple hardcover/paperback books.

name: Fitness Gear User
definition: Purchases fitness-related products (yoga mat, dumbbell, water bottle).

name: Beauty & Skincare Enthusiast
definition: Buys cosmetics (lipsticks) and skincare (serums, moisturizers, sunscreen).

name: Kids & Toy Shopper
definition: Purchases toys (building blocks, dolls, action figures, plush toys).

name: Fashion & Apparel Buyer
definition: Buys clothing (dresses, t-shirts, jeans, sneakers) in varied colors.

name: Single-Product Specialist
definition: Purchases only one unique product (e.g., lamp, webcam, dress, or puzzle).

name: Variety-Seeking Shopper
definition: Buys 4–7+ diverse products across categories.

name: Electronics & Tech Buyer
definition: Prioritizes gadgets (webcam, smartwatch, SSD) and accessories.

name: Puzzle & Game Lover
definition: Buys puzzles, board games, or similar leisure items.

name: Home & Lifestyle Enthusiast
definition: Buys home decor (lamps, cookware) and appliances (vacuum, coffee maker).

name: Gadget & Accessory Buyer
definition: Purchases tech accessories (keyboard, mouse, SSD) in bulk or multiple variants.

name: Diverse Book Reader
definition: Buys multiple paperback or e-book titles, sometimes with repeats.

name: Mixed-Category Shopper
definition: Purchases 3+ items across 3+ distinct categories.

name: Frequent Replenisher
definition: Repurchases the same item 2–5+ times (e.g., moisturizer, hoodie, sunscreen).

name: Lipstick Collector
definition: Buys multiple lipstick shades or frequently.

name: Kitchen & Home Appliance Buyer
definition: Purchases small appliances (coffee makers, blenders) and home items.

name: E-Book & Paperback Reader
definition: Purchases e-books and paperbacks (1–4+ times) across genres.

name: Doll & Toy Collector
definition: Purchases dolls, building blocks, or puzzles, often in diverse colors/styles.

name: Action Figure Enthusiast
definition: Purchases action figures (3+ times) with minimal other category overlap.
